name: insurance brokers managing 5–15 claims/month tool
description: For insurance brokers processing 5–15 claims/month, inefficient claim filing causes delayed resolutions. We simplify the claim process instead of manual tracking and filing through email and spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inefficient claim filing and tracking processes lead to delayed resolutions for clients.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient claim filing and tracking processes lead to delayed resolutions for clients.
